Supertubos will offer some 1.5m opportunities today, mostly for practicing duck diving in chop.
🌊 Swell: 1.5m @ 12s 💨 Wind: 12.0km/h SSW (ONSHORE) 💨 Gusts: 27.0km/h 🌊 Wind waves: 0.4m

programme.title: 🌊 1.5m @ 12s CROSS
programme.desc:
At 1.5m with that wind, today's Molhe Leste will either be surprisingly fun, or a complete write-off.
🌊 Swell: 1.5m @ 12s 💨 Wind: 12.0km/h SSW (CROSS) 💨 Gusts: 27.0km/h 🌊 Wind waves: 0.4m

programme.title: 🌊 1.5m @ 12s CROSS
programme.desc:
Should be rideable if you like fighting 1.5m windswell and a bit of chop.
🌊 Swell: 1.5m @ 12s 💨 Wind: 12.0km/h SSW (CROSS) 💨 Gusts: 27.0km/h 🌊 Wind waves: 0.4m

programme.title: ⭐⭐ 1.5m @ 12s OFFSHORE
programme.desc:
Yeah, you could probably coax a ride or two out of that 1.5m swell today.
🌊 Swell: 1.5m @ 12s 💨 Wind: 12.0km/h SSW (OFFSHORE) 💨 Gusts: 27.0km/h 🌊 Wind waves: 0.4m
📋 Clean conditions with offshore wind

programme.title: ⭐⭐ 1.5m @ 12s OFFSHORE
programme.desc:

🌊 Swell: 1.5m @ 12s 💨 Wind: 12.0km/h SSW (OFFSHORE) 💨 Gusts: 27.0km/h 🌊 Wind waves: 0.4m
📋 Clean conditions with offshore wind

programme.desc:

programme.title: 🌊 2.4m @ 11s CROSS
programme.desc:
The 2.4m swell and cross-shore breeze suggest a vigorous, yet likely unrewarding, day in the washing machine.
🌊 Swell: 2.4m @ 11s 💨 Wind: 15.0km/h N (CROSS) 💨 Gusts: 31.0km/h 🌊 Wind waves: 0.3m

programme.desc:

programme.title: ⭐⭐ 2.3m @ 12s OFFSHORE
programme.desc:
Those 2.3 meter Supertubos sets might just offer a ride or two before the inevitable closeout claims us all.
🌊 Swell: 2.3m @ 12s 💨 Wind: 19.0km/h N (OFFSHORE) 💨 Gusts: 32.0km/h 🌊 Wind waves: 0.2m

programme.desc:

programme.title: 🌊 2.3m @ 12s CROSS
programme.desc:

programme.desc:
